_instructions: Owner guide. To add a PHOTO: drop the image into /images/gallery/, then add an entry with type "image", src (path under images/gallery/), alt (short descriptive sentence), category (interior, exterior, or wheels), and w/h (pixel size). To add a VIDEO: drop the .mp4 into /videos/ and a poster image into /images/gallery/, then add an entry with type "video", src (poster path), video (mp4 path), duration (ISO 8601 like PT12S), alt, category, and w/h (poster size). Newest entries can go at the top.
